name: Veaceslav \u021aurcanu
headline: Python Backend Engineer | Linux & IoT Systems
summary: Python Backend Engineer specialized in backend services for Linux and embedded systems. Experienced in designing microservices, async applications, CI/CD pipelines, and system-level integrations.
certifications: PCAP \u2013 Certified Associate in Python Programming

projects: SCB - Web application for a Embedded device, the application used React for FE and Sanic Web framework for BE side.
HL7Connect - Small web application that will be responsible for configure HL7 converter daemon, the application used React for FE and Sanic Web framework for BE side.
MatterHorn - Software building, migration (from IoT device (ARMv5) to newer IoT device (ARMv7)), testing on target device.
desc: Developed backend services for embedded devices using Sanic and asyncio
Integrated socketIO
Developed and implemented client-side features using React+MUI, improving responsiveness and user interaction
Built CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps
Automated testing using pytest and Robot Framework
Worked with ARM-based IoT devices and Linux systems

projects: Dental Tech Register (DTR) - Web application for managing work-order records. Technicians can register, log in, and maintain their own records (description, work started/finished dates, completion status). Built with a Django REST backend and a React (MUI) frontend, orchestrated with Docker.
desc: Implemented user authentication (registration, login, logout)
Created CRUD functionality for records
Designed database models using SQLite
Developed REST APIs using Django REST Framework

projects: Route Calculator - A React SPA that lets users select two points on a map(OSMR), calculates the distance(Leaflet / react-leaflet) and travel price, and generates a QR code(qrcode.react) linking to a Stripe payment form.
desc: Implemented SPA application

projects: Private CRM - The project implements an Customer Relationship Management portal with an advanced SSO (Single Sign On) technology.
NStick - Is a complex project providing SSH connections to remote devices.
Contact-Form and verify microservices - Worked on a set of microservices written in python, asyncio using Sanic framework.
desc: Implemented SSO logic and integrated web services into a central CRM portal using Python and Sanic.
Developed secure SSH connectivity features for remote devices, managing complex TCP/IP and SSL configurations.
Refined and scaled Python-based microservices, utilizing Asyncio to ensure high performance under heavy client loads.
Implemented Django REST API
Built web scraping tools using Scrapy and BeautifulSoup
Contributed to the FTU (First Time Use) flow, ensuring a seamless initial setup and hardware-to-software orchestration for new users.
Developed and tested OTA (Over-the-Air) update mechanisms, managing secure firmware delivery and system stability.
Assisted in debugging and testing code, improving overall software reliability.
Collaborated with the development team on project requirements and implementation.
Gained hands-on experience with Python libraries such as Falcon, Celery, Jsonschema.
